videos.headline: Dylan Sampson breaks off for Tennessee rushing TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson dodges tackles as he runs in for a Tennessee touchdown vs. Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson breaks off for Tennessee rushing TD) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Squirrel White makes wide-open TD grab for Vols
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava airs out a dime to Squirrel White for an early Tennessee touchdown vs. Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Squirrel White makes wide-open TD grab for Vols) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dont'e Thornton Jr. snags and scores a 73-yard TD for Tennessee
videos.description: Dont'e Thornton Jr. reels in a deep pass from Nico Iamaleava for a 73-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dont'e Thornton Jr. snags and scores a 73-yard TD for Tennessee) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davon Booth punches in Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Davon Booth finds the end zone to reduce Mississippi State's deficit vs. Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Davon Booth punches in Mississippi State TD) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johnnie Daniels finds the route for Mississippi State TD
